program.description: Path to the binary to be debugged

cwd.description: Directory to execute the program in

args.description: Command-line arguments passed to the program

env.description: Additional environment variables to pass to the debugging (and debugged) process

stopOnEntry.description: Whether to stop the stop the program immediately after launching it

debugger.description: The type of debugger to use

console.description: Specify where to launch the program: internal console (internalConsole), integrated terminal (integratedTerminal) or external terminal (externalTerminal).

label.description: The label to use for the debug scenario
